parameters.query: INSERT INTO tg_updates_seen (update_id) VALUES ({{ $json.update_id }}) ON CONFLICT (update_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING update_id;

SELECT
  (SELECT profile FROM style_profile WHERE chat_id = {{ $('Extract & Normalize').item.json.chat_id }}) AS style,
  (SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (SELECT message FROM n8n_chat_histories WHERE session_id = 'tg:' || {{ $('Extract & Normalize').item.json.chat_id }} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20) t) AS memory,
  (SELECT json_agg(p) FROM (SELECT id, action, params FROM pending_actions WHERE chat_id = {{ $('Extract & Normalize').item.json.chat_id }} AND status = 'awaiting') p) AS pending;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Extract & Normalize').item.json.text, chat_id: $('Extract & Normalize').item.json.chat_id, memory: $json.memory, style: $json.style, pending: $json.pending }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO audit_log (chat_id, action, params, decision) VALUES ({{ $('Extract & Normalize').item.json.chat_id }}, {{ JSON.stringify($('Call Agent Router').item.json.action || 'unknown') }}, {{ JSON.stringify(($('Call Agent Router').item.json.tool_calls) || {}) }}::jsonb, {{ JSON.stringify($json.data && $json.data.approved ? 'approved' : 'denied') }});
